recommendations.title: Onward
recommendations.overview: In a suburban fantasy world, two teenage elf brothers embark on an extraordinary quest to discover if there is still a little magic left out there.

recommendations.title: Return to Nim's Island

recommendations.title: The Ewok Adventure
recommendations.genres: Adventure, Family, Fantasy, Science Fiction, TV Movie
recommendations.overview: Wicket the Ewok and his friends agree to help two shipwrecked human children, Mace and Cindel, on a quest to find their parents.

recommendations.title: The Star
recommendations.overview: A small but brave donkey and his animal friends become the unsung heroes of the greatest story ever told: the first Christmas.

recommendations.title: Flow
recommendations.overview: A solitary cat, displaced by a great flood, finds refuge on a boat with various species and must navigate the challenges of adapting to a transformed world together.

recommendations.title: Ewoks: The Battle for Endor
recommendations.genres: Adventure, Family, TV Movie, Science Fiction, Fantasy

recommendations.title: Nim's Island
recommendations.overview: A young girl inhabits an isolated island with her scientist father and communicates with a reclusive author of the novel she's reading.

recommendations.title: Dinosaur
recommendations.overview: An orphaned dinosaur raised by lemurs joins an arduous trek to a sancturary after a meteorite shower destroys his family home.

recommendations.title: Corrective Measures

recommendations.title: The Wiz
recommendations.overview: Dorothy Gale, a shy kindergarten teacher, is swept away to the magic land of Oz where she embarks on a quest to return home.
